intent: Policy brief: 'encryption backdoors and the crypto wars'. (1) Wikipedia — 'Crypto Wars' and 'Clipper chip'. 5+ facts on the historical fights and their resolutions. (2) Reddit /f/technology or /f/privacy — 3+ posts on current government vs. platform encryption debates. Report must cover: historical precedent, current landscape, 2+ community arguments, and a closing on trade-offs. Cite.
